# Oleg Tsvetkov

> Personal website of Oleg Tsvetkov (handle: Hekzory), a Software Engineer at VK
> (VK Ads, DevExp team) focused on DevOps, CI/CD, and infrastructure - Consul
> service mesh, Python, Go, Docker. Based in Moscow, Russia. The site is
> bilingual: English is the default at the root, Russian mirrors every page
> under /ru/.

## Pages

- [Home](https://tsv.one/): Profile, social links, and an interactive terminal.
- [Resume](https://tsv.one/resume): Work experience, technical skills, education, and languages.
- [Articles](https://tsv.one/articles/): Blog index - notes, write-ups, and breakdowns on infrastructure, DevOps, and development.

## Articles

- [uv in production: the speed is real, the integration isn't free](https://tsv.one/articles/uv-in-production-caveats): First-hand ~90 days running Astral's uv in production - five caveats (venv requirement, firewalled Python install, cache-lock timeouts, first-index, bytecode), each with the exact error and the fix.
- [Why all this](https://tsv.one/articles/why-this-blog): First post - who I am, what the blog is for, and why.

## Languages

- English is the default and lives at the root (e.g. /, /resume, /articles/, /articles/<slug>).
- Russian mirrors every page under /ru/ (e.g. /ru/, /ru/resume, /ru/articles/, /ru/articles/<slug>).
- Both directions are reciprocally linked via hreflang; x-default points to the English version.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/hekzory)
- [Telegram](https://t.me/hekzory)
- Email: oleg@tsv.one

## Notes

- This is a static personal website. There is no public API.
- Structured data is embedded as JSON-LD on each page: schema.org Person/ProfilePage on home and resume, BlogPosting on article posts.
